name: Scramble-in-a-Pocket WW
recipeInstructions:
1. In a small skillet, heat the olive oil over medium-high heat.
2. Add the sliced mushrooms, diced onion, and diced bell pepper to the skillet. Cook, stirring frequently, until the vegetables are tender-crisp, about 1 minute.
3. Stir in the egg substitute and softened cream cheese. Cook, stirring constantly, until the egg substitute is set, about 2 minutes.
4. Open a pita pocket by cutting about 1/4 of the way around the edge with a sharp knife.
5. Fill the pita pocket with the egg substitute mixture.
Weight Watcher Exchanges: 1/2 Fat, 1 Protein, 2 Vegetables, 1 Bread
Optional Calories.
Nutritional Analysis per serving: 190 calories, 11 g protein, 5 g fat, 26 g carbohydrate, 58 mg calcium, 344 mg sodium, 7 mg cholesterol, 2 g dietary fiber.
Calories from fat: 22.5%
